name: JoAi: Update Memory

description.en: Update the content, category, or tags of an existing memory stored by your agent.
description.de: Aktualisiere den Inhalt, die Kategorie oder die Tags einer bestehenden Erinnerung deines Agenten.
description.es: Update the content, category, or tags of an existing memory stored by your agent.
description.fr: Update the content, category, or tags of an existing memory stored by your agent.
description.ro: Update the content, category, or tags of an existing memory stored by your agent.
description.it: Update the content, category, or tags of an existing memory stored by your agent.

bot: Use this when the user wants to correct or extend an existing memory. If the user refers to a memory by content, search memories first to find the matching ID.

inputs.name: Memory ID

description.en: The ID of the memory to update
description.de: Die ID der zu aktualisierenden Erinnerung
description.es: The ID of the memory to update
description.fr: The ID of the memory to update
description.ro: The ID of the memory to update
description.it: The ID of the memory to update

inputs.bot: The memory hash ID. If the user refers to a memory by content, search memories first to find the matching ID.

inputs.name: Content

description.de: Das aktualisierte Wissen oder die Tatsache

inputs.bot: A concise, self-contained statement of the updated fact or knowledge.

inputs.name: Category
inputs.bot: Optional category like preference, fact, experience, or relationship.
Optional comma-separated tags to categorize this memory.
